no: M'Khiin Friendship by dark0dave. Short friendship path with M'Khiin during Siege of Dragonspear. Four timer-based talks plus story moment conversations.
sum: A short friendship path with M'Khiin during Siege of Dragonspear with timer-based talks and story conversations.

co.n: M'Khiin Friendship for Siege of Dragonspear
co.no: Adds a friendship path with M'Khiin during SoD. Four timer-based talks and story-triggered conversations.
co.tp2n: We need every fighter we can get. Even a goblin.
